title: Audit a realtime connection lifecycle
description: Read a WebSocket/SSE handler and report on reconnect-resync, backpressure, heartbeat, and auth revalidation.
body: Use when asked whether a realtime endpoint is robust. Actions: inspect the connection handler to verify messages carry sequence ids and reconnect resumes from a client cursor; check the outbound buffer is bounded with a slow-consumer policy; verify a heartbeat reaps dead connections; confirm authorization is re-checked as tokens expire. Do not assume the socket stays up or that connect-time auth suffices. Report and record the handler location, classifying gaps as no-resume, unbounded-buffer, no-heartbeat, or auth-only-at-connect. This skill is read-only and must not open production connections. Validation signals include a confirmed reconnect-recovery path. Risk boundary: streaming private data on an expired token is a blocking security finding.
